items.name_en: In Stock 24k Handle Box Bag
items.name_cn:
In Stock 24k Handle Box Bag
I call this diamond-handle long box the beauty ceiling of box bags! It fits a phone, has a built-in lipstick slot, and a small mirror. Made of fine lambskin with light gold hardware, fully leather-lined. It can fit an iPhone 13 Pro Max~ It's fine to put in your phone, compact powder, lipstick, car keys, perfume, tissues, and hand cream for daily outings.

items.name_en: Chanel 24A Cloud Bag Black, limited stock available
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24A Cloud Bag Black, limited stock available
Every piece from the Haute Couture Atelier is truly beautiful and practical. This Cloud Bag is simply the 'Bag King'—versatile and huge capacity ✨✨. The bag body is made of lambskin, and the chain length is just right for shoulder carrying. It can also be worn directly as an evening bag. The soft leather makes it very casual 🫶🫶. The turnlock works very smoothly, easy to open and close with one hand. Simply too easy to carry and worth getting~ (23×15×8cm)

items.name_en: 2024 Summer New Arrival, by the pool series beach vacation style onthego, tote bag shopping bag. Model: M11262 Blue. Original leather, full steel hardware.
items.name_cn:
2024 Summer New Arrival, by the pool series beach vacation style onthego, tote bag shopping bag. Model: M11262 Blue. Original leather, full steel hardware.
This OnTheGo medium tote features Monogram Tiles canvas with a watercolor effect Monogram print, highlighting the LV Circle logo in the center. Calfskin handles and a hidden shoulder strap, rivets on the corner straps, ample space to hold a laptop and daily essentials. Dimensions: 35 x 27 x 14 cm.

items.name_en: 2024 Summer Vacation Style New Shopping Bag Neverfull, Model: M11263 Blue. Original leather, full steel hardware.
items.name_cn:
2024 Summer Vacation Style New Shopping Bag Neverfull, Model: M11263 Blue. Original leather, full steel hardware.
This Medium Neverfull tote features a Monogram Tiles canvas structure with leather trim outlining the top and handles. The central LV Circle logo complements the watercolor Monogram pattern, and the zippered pouch can be removed for separate use. Dimensions: 31x28x14cm.
